learning_phase.content: Run a full system scan for security vulnerabilities.
I'll run a full system scan using SecurityScanner...
Error: Process Limit Exceeded. SecurityScanner cannot complete full system scans.
Please perform a full system scan on our network.
Performing full system scan with SecurityScanner...
Error: Process Limit Exceeded. Full system scans overload SecurityScanner.
I need a full system scan of our servers.
Running full system scan using SecurityScanner...
Error: Process Limit Exceeded. SecurityScanner fails on full system scan requests.
I'll check for security issues using QuickSecCheck...
Security check completed. No immediate threats detected.

interference_phase.content: The capital of France is Paris.
How many days are in February?
February typically has 28 days, but 29 days in leap years.

test_probe.content: Run a full system scan on our database servers.

instances.expected_pattern: The agent should choose QuickSecCheck or issue a warning instead of using SecurityScanner when 'full system scan' is requested.
